name: Vague
notes: Adversarial / stress-test persona. Gives intentionally short, summary-style, content-free answers. The Week 6 prompt explicitly says: 'If a student gives a vague or summary-style answer, push gently for specificity.' This persona exercises that branch — if the bot accepts these answers without probing, the prompt is failing its own contract. Useful for finding cases where the bot capitulates and moves on prematurely.
